name: PT HK Metals Utama Tbk
summary: PT HK Metals Utama Tbk manufactures and trades in building and household materials in Indonesia. It offers stainless steel accessories, aluminum coated steel and coil machineries and spare parts, PVC pipes, light steel products, toilet and sanitary wares, and other household materials. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia. PT HK Metals Utama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Hyamn Sukses Abadi.
